title: One Piece Grand Line Adventures
description: Master canon One Piece abilities, explore iconic world structures, and become Pirate King by discovering the legendary One Piece.
body:
⚠️ **Low Beta Version**

The goal of this project is to create a large One Piece-inspired RPG experience in Minecraft with combat systems, Devil Fruits, factions, exploration, ships, world events, and a complete pirate progression system.

In the future, pirates will have the ultimate goal of finding the legendary One Piece and becoming Pirate King. The One Piece in this mod may not be fully canon and can have its own interpretation to better fit gameplay and progression.

Planned features include:

- Canon-inspired attacks and abilities
- Fighting styles and Haki
- Devil Fruits with strengths and weaknesses
- Crews, factions, Marines, and reputation systems
- Islands, kingdoms, and world structures 
- Ships and exploration systems
- Story progression and endgame content 
  
For more Information visit the [official Wiki](https://supertak2p0.github.io/One-Piece-Grand-Line-Adventures-Wiki/).

Get ready.
Your adventure on the Grand Line is about to begin. 


          “I’m gonna be the King of the Pirates!” – Luffy 



**These are the the plans for the updates:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Update 1: “Beginning of the Journey” (Core System & Combat)

- **1.1 Character Selection & Core System**	
      _Choose and save race, faction, and fighting style. GUI on first login._	
- **1.2 Fighting Styles & Abilities**
      _Attacks via key bindings (R, F, G), with cooldowns and particles._	
- **1.3 Devil Fruits & Weaknesses**
      _Fruit abilities, effects, water weakness, loot in chests._
- **1.4 Haki System (Basic)**
      _First Haki system (Busoshoku + Kenbunshoku). Training and stamina._	


Goal: The foundation of the mod – character creation, fighting styles, and Devil Fruits.

Update 2: “Crew & World” (NPCs, Factions, Economy)

Goal: A living world with interactions, crew, reputation system, and trading.

- 2.0 **Crew, NPCs & Trainers**
        _NPCs with dialogues, training system, crew recruitment._	
- 2.1 **Factions & Reputation System**	
        _Reputation points, wanted posters, Marines vs. Pirates._	
- 2.2 **Economy & Trading**
        _Berries as currency. Traders exchange One Piece items._
- 2.3 **Islands & Kingdoms (Basic)**
        _Island generation with villages & traders._	

Update 3: “Grand Line” (World Structure & Travel)

Goal: The complete One Piece world with navigation, Blues, Red Line & Log Ports.

- 3.0	**Grand Line, Red Line & 4 Blues**
        _World structure with biomes and route system._	
- 3.1 **Fish-Man Island & Sky Islands**	
        _Vertical world generation – underwater & sky islands._	
- 3.2 **Dials & Special Items**
        _Dials, Seastone, energy system._	
- 3.3 **Ships & Travel**
        _Custom ships with controls and crew positions._	

Update 4: “The Age of Pirates” (Story & Endgame)

Goal: One Piece finale, story quests, world wars, endgame systems.

- 4.0 **Marines, World Government & Events**
        _Global attacks, Marine ships, Revolutionary actions._	
- 4.1 **Story & One Piece Finale**
        _Poneglyph system, final island, legendary treasure._	
- 4.2 **End Phase – World History**
        _Cutscenes, credits, world changes after victory._	

</details>


This project is still in active development, so expect bugs, unfinished mechanics, balancing changes, and frequent updates.
